Description: Manage UI state with ViewModel and StateFlow for lifecycle-aware reactive state
Do: Use StateFlow for state; collect with collectAsStateWithLifecycle; use sealed classes for UI state
Dont: Use LiveData in Compose; use mutableStateOf without ViewModel; pass state through many layers

Description: Navigate with type-safe routes using Kotlin serialization and NavHost
Do: Use @Serializable route classes; type-safe arguments; handle deep links
Dont: Use string-based routes; pass complex objects as JSON strings
Code Bad: navController.navigate('product/${product.id}')\n// String-based, no type safety, easy to break

Description: Use Hilt (Dagger wrapper) for compile-time dependency injection in Android
Do: Annotate with @HiltViewModel @Inject @Module; use @Provides for third-party deps
Dont: Use manual DI; use Koin in large projects where compile-time safety matters

Description: Write reusable testable Composables following Compose conventions
Do: Use slot APIs; hoist state; keep Composables stateless; use Modifier parameter
Dont: Create stateful composables; hardcode sizes; skip Modifier parameter

Description: Minimize recompositions using stable types derivedStateOf and remember
Do: Use @Stable/@Immutable annotations; use derivedStateOf; use key() for lists; profile with Layout Inspector
Dont: Pass lambdas without remember; use unstable types in state; recompose entire screens

Description: Local persistence with Room database emitting Kotlin Flows for reactive UI updates
Do: Use @Dao with Flow returns; define entities with @Entity; use migrations
Dont: Return LiveData from Room; skip migrations; query on main thread

Description: Test Compose UI with ComposeTestRule for reliable assertions and interactions
Do: Use createComposeRule; find by testTag/text/role; use performClick; wait for idle
Dont: Test only ViewModels; skip Compose UI tests; use Espresso for Compose screens
Code Bad: // No Compose tests\n// Only ViewModel unit tests\n// Missing UI interaction verification

Description: Configure Material 3 theme with dynamic color support and custom color schemes
Do: Use MaterialTheme with colorScheme; support dynamic colors on Android 12+; define typography
Dont: Hardcode colors in composables; skip dark theme; ignore dynamic colors
Code Bad: // Hardcoded colors\nText('Hello', color = Color(0xFF333333)) // No theme support
